vibe: Apple-level attention to detail, premium, calm, motivating, minimal visual noise.

typography.body_font: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter font-medium text-slate-900
scale.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-medium text-slate-900

spacing_and_layout.padding_philosophy: Generous spacing. p-6 or p-8 inside cards to prevent text collision.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: Bento Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-3xl for main containers, rounded-2xl for inner cards, rounded-full for buttons.

surfaces_and_shadows.card_style: Pure white background, 1px border-slate-200/60, shadow-[0_2px_10px_rgba(0,0,0,0.02)]. No harsh shadows.
surfaces_and_shadows.glass_header: Sticky nav with backdrop-blur-2xl, bg-white/70, border-b border-slate-200/50.
surfaces_and_shadows.hover_states: Hover lift: -translate-y-1, shadow-lg, transition-all duration-300 ease-out.

components.buttons: rounded-full px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
components.inputs: bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-900 focus:border-transparent transition-all
components.charts: Use Recharts or Shadcn charts. Remove grid lines for a cleaner look. Use smooth curved lines (monotone).
components.badges: rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-sm font-medium bg-slate-100 text-slate-700

motion.page_transitions: Fade in with slight upward motion (y: 10 to y: 0) using framer-motion.
motion.micro_interactions: Active states scale down to 0.98. Hover states slightly lift.

image_urls.description: Clean white wavy lines for minimal login/register splash page
Abstract pastel 3D glass sphere to represent the AI Coach persona
Minimalist black and white silhouette for user profiles
Runner silhouette moving uphill for goals/milestones dashboard widget

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Outfit for all Headings. Import it from Google Fonts.
Use strict Apple-like Glassmorphism: bg-white/70, backdrop-blur-xl for sticky/floating elements.
All cards must be rounded-3xl with very soft shadows (shadow-sm) and a subtle 1px border.
Strictly avoid 'Inter' for headings. Only use it or -apple-system for body copy.
Implement the 'Bento Grid' strategy for the dashboard (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4).
Every actionable element MUST have a hover state and an active scale-down state.
Ensure generous padding inside cards (p-6 or p-8).
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').
Do not use generic blue defaults. Use a stark white/charcoal palette with functional accents for Streaks (Orange) and AI (Blue).
